name: AYTU BIOPHARMA, INC
business: Aytu BioPharma is a pharmaceutical company focused on advancing innovative medicines for complex central nervous system diseases. It sells prescription pharmaceutical products including EXXUA (gepirone) for major depressive disorder, an ADHD portfolio (Adzenys XR-ODT and Cotempla XR-ODT), and a pediatric portfolio (Karbinal ER, Poly-Vi-Flor, and Tri-Vi-Flor). These products are sold primarily in the United States through third-party wholesalers, distributors, and pharmacies.

exposures.sentence: We are a pharmaceutical company focused on advancing innovative medicines for complex central nervous system diseases to improve the quality of life for patients.

catalysts.event: Anticipated launch of EXXUA in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025
catalysts.sentence: It is our expectation that EXXUA has the potential to serve as a major growth catalyst for us and we anticipate launching EXXUA in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025 as a centerpiece of our commercial efforts.

catalysts.event: Trial for Granules patent infringement lawsuit scheduled to begin
catalysts.sentence: This litigation is ongoing, and a trial has been scheduled to begin on December 7, 2026.

catalysts.event: Actavis can begin marketing generic Adzenys
catalysts.sentence: Under the agreement with Actavis, Actavis has the right to manufacture and market its approved generic version of Adzenys under the ANDA beginning on September 1, 2025.

catalysts.event: Teva can begin marketing generic Cotempla
catalysts.sentence: Under the agreement with Teva, we granted Teva the right to manufacture and market its approved generic version of Cotempla under the ANDA beginning on July 1, 2026, or earlier under certain circumstances.

tamClaims.claim: Over $22 billion United States prescription MDD market
tamClaims.sentence: EXXUA has been extensively studied in over 5,000 patients and represents a new class of therapeutics to compete in the over $22 billion United States prescription MDD market.
We believe it can become a very important treatment option for the estimated 21 million Americans affected by MDD.

tamClaims.claim: Over 340 million antidepressant prescriptions were written in 2024 in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: Over 340 million antidepressant prescriptions were written in 2024 in the United States, yet significant unmet needs remain considering the unacceptable side effects associated with current therapeutics.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 104 million prescriptions for medications with ADHD labeling were written in the United States in 2024, generating $28.6 billion in sales
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, approximately 104 million prescriptions for medications with ADHD labeling were written in the United States, generating $28.6 billion in sales.
The prescription antihistamine category is a large category with approximately 54 million antihistamine prescriptions written in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: 5.9 million multi-vitamin prescriptions written in the United States in 2024
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, 5.9 million multi-vitamin prescriptions were written in the United States.
